No Poverty.reason: Course mentions "地方創生" and "大專生洄游農村計畫," which can improve economic resources for vulnerable groups, aligning with Target 1.4.

Zero Hunger.reason: "友善耕作" and "有機茶製作專題" promote sustainable agricultural practices, aligning with Target 2.4 for resilient food production systems.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: Course explicitly aims to cultivate "自我減壓的自癒能力" and includes "療癒專題" and "茶席減壓," directly supporting mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).
evidence: 學習自我減壓的自癒能力

Quality Education.reason: The course provides vocational skills for employment (Target 4.4) by preparing for a national tea-making technician license and promotes education for sustainable development through "土地倫理" (Target 4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Course promotes job creation through professional certification (Target 8.3) and sustainable tourism via "茶文化路徑" and "地方創生" (Target 8.9), fostering local economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Learning to use "專業製茶機具" and "有機茶製作專題" relates to upgrading industrial processes for sustainability and efficiency (Target 9.4).
evidence: 實際操作學習使用專業製茶機具

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Course promotes "地方創生" and "茶文化路徑," safeguarding cultural heritage through "口述歷史紀錄" (Target 11.4) and supporting local development (Target 11.a).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: "友善耕作與土地倫理" and "與自然共生" directly promote sustainable management of natural resources (Target 12.2) and sustainable lifestyles (Target 12.8).

Climate Action.reason: Understanding "24節氣與72氣候" and "與自然共生" can raise awareness of natural cycles, indirectly supporting climate change education and adaptation (Target 13.3).

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence found in the course syllabus.

Life on Land.reason: The course's core objective is to foster thinking about "人─土地（環境）" and explicitly covers "友善耕作與土地倫理," directly supporting sustainable land management (Targets 15.1, 15.9).
evidence: 培養具有思考「人─土地（環境）」的能力

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Discussion of "製茶技術人員的法規、專業倫理" minimally links to promoting accountability and effective institutions within a profession (Target 16.6).
evidence: 製茶技術人員的法規、專業倫理

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course involves multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17) through collaboration with a student club, professional lecturers, and local young farmers.
